name: nano
description: nano is a lightweight, open-source SIEM (Security Information and Event Management) platform. It ingests logs over HTTP, Splunk HEC, OpenTelemetry, Fluent and the Vector protocol into ClickHouse, with a search/hunting UI (nano Pipe Language), scheduled and real-time detection rules, and prevalence-based false-positive reduction.

notes.text: On first visit you are redirected to /setup to create the admin account. It is open until claimed, so do this promptly.
The log-ingestion bearer token is saved inside the container at ~/nano.creds and in /opt/nano/.env (VECTOR_AUTH_TOKEN). Send logs to http://<ip>:8080 with 'Authorization: Bearer <token>'.
ClickHouse is memory-hungry: 8GB RAM is the floor, 12-16GB is recommended for real ingestion volume.
Runs over plain HTTP with NANOSIEM_DEV_MODE enabled so auth cookies work without TLS. Front the container with HTTPS for any production exposure.
